name: Cannon Beach Surf & Paddleboard Rentals
summary: Rent boards, kayaks, and gear for a full day on the Oregon Coast surf and calm waters near Ecola Creek.
description: Located steps from the beach, this outfitter offers half-day and full-day rentals for paddleboards, kayaks, and wetsuits. Instructors are on call for beginners. Ideal for families and first-time visitors wanting to get on the water without owning equipment.
seasonality: Open Memorial Day through Labor Day. Limited weekend availability in spring and fall.
seoTitle: Paddleboard & Kayak Rentals in Cannon Beach, OR
seoDescription: Rent paddleboards, kayaks, and wetsuits in Cannon Beach. Beginner-friendly instruction available steps from the beach.

name: Newport Lighthouse Inn
summary: Boutique oceanfront inn adjacent to the Yaquina Head Outstanding Natural Area with panoramic Pacific views.
description: The Newport Lighthouse Inn offers 24 individually decorated rooms, all with ocean-facing windows. Guests can walk to Yaquina Head Lighthouse in under five minutes. Continental breakfast included. Pet-friendly rooms available on request.
seoTitle: Newport Lighthouse Inn — Oceanfront Hotel Near Yaquina Head
seoDescription: Boutique oceanfront inn in Newport, OR. Steps from Yaquina Head Lighthouse. Continental breakfast included.
